Backup & Restore
Data save aur recover karein
🕙 Auto-backup raat 11 PM (data > 2MB). Manual backup: "Backup Now" → Downloads folder mein save hoga.
📤 Export / Import Data
⚠️ Import karne se pehle ka data overwrite ho jayega. Pehle export kar ke backup lein.
